title: desmodium glutinosum f. unifoliatum
intro: Desmodium glutinosum f. unifoliatum, also known as a type of tick trefoil, is a perennial herb native to tropical Asia, known for its medicinal and edible properties. Its leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Desmodium glutinosum f. unifoliatum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being consumed as a vegetable or used in traditional remedies.
